title: Arivium Survival
description: The official modpack for Arivium survival!
body:
We are a Java Cobblemon server with a few different server types you can join, all related to Pokemon of course!

Survival - A typical survival world based in pokemon. We have a fairly large map for you to explore, build a house in, catch pokemon, train, breed, etc. Keep inventory is on and spawns are high, so if you enjoy survival minecraft play, then this is the server for you!

Arivium - A custom adventure map. Battle it out against Team Eclipse as you journey around the Arivium region! Features include custom spawns, a unique storyline, side-quests, and a whole lot of detail.
